---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your idea and expected behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other options you considered.

## Scope

- Backend
- Frontend
- Data ingestion
- Models/training
- Monitoring/ops

## Success Criteria

How will we know this is complete and useful?

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, mockups, or references.
